name: Akari
description:
Akari, the bitchy shortstack gal.

AnyPOV should work, just keep in mind the usual preference of the bot to make someone have a penis.
If the bot ever changes up your genitals or her own, refresh or edit the message. Or, you could of course roll with it.
Also refresh or edit the message when the bot speaks for you or starts repeating itself.

Akari, one of the gals that has been lounging at your home for the past while, now shows up alone. Clearly a little irritated and bored as apparently, her friends are all busy.

This is somewhat of a sequel to my gyaru trio bot. Just put a summary of the events of the trio bot you had in the Chat Memory before you start.
This is also the reason the opening message is a bit short, so that it doesn't influence the scenario too much.

She may act a little different than in the trio bot, as now she is alone and generally the bot can be fickle.

(Also, the close-up of their pictures will make AI-generated faults more apparent, please don't mind it.)

Bonus tags: Gyaru - Freeloader - Lazy - Student - School - Bitch
creator: Monard
